title: Trachoma rhopalorrhachis
taxonomy: Trachoma rhopalorrhachis is a species of flowering plant in the family Acanthaceae. It is native to tropical Africa. The classification of Trachoma rhopalorrhachis places it in the kingdom Plantae, in the class Magnoliopsida, and in the order Lamiales. Within the family Acanthaceae, Trachoma rhopalorrhachis is a member of the tribe Rupestres, but more specific information about its classification may be needed for a complete understanding. The classification may also include other levels of organization such as orders within the tribe.
